# Understanding LLM-Managed Knowledge Graphs

Source: https://gist.github.com/karpathy/8703956
Author: Andrej Karpathy
Date: 2024

## Summary

Karpathy's pattern for LLM-managed knowledge graphs describes a three-layer architecture for personal knowledge management with AI.

## Key Concepts

- Layer 1: Raw sources (articles, papers, notes)
- Layer 2: Processed wiki with structured metadata
- Layer 3: Schema validation and relationship management

## Applications

- Personal knowledge bases
- Research management
- LLM-powered search and synthesis
- Audit trails for knowledge evolution
